---
title: "Rhysis — Epistemological Infrastructure"
format: html
---

<!-- Language Switcher Header -->
<div class="absolute top-6 right-8 z-50 text-sm md:text-base font-medium text-white tracking-wide">
  <p>
    <span class="font-bold border-b-2 border-teal-400 pb-0.5">EN</span>
    <span class="mx-2 text-slate-400">|</span> 
    <a href="../es/" class="text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:underline transition-all">ES</a>
  </p>
</div>

```{=html}
<!-- Hero -->
<section class="hero-bg min-h-screen flex items-center relative overflow-hidden text-white">
  <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6 text-center">
    <h1 class="text-6xl md:text-7xl font-bold leading-tight mb-6">
      From Fixed Being<br>to <span class="text-teal-300">Vital Flow</span>
    </h1>
    <p class="text-2xl md:text-3xl text-slate-200 mb-10 max-w-3xl mx-auto">
      Rhysis is an epistemological infrastructure designed for understanding <strong>human trajectories in continuous becoming</strong>.
    </p>
    <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 justify-center">
      <a href="#rhysis" class="bg-teal-500 hover:bg-teal-400 text-slate-900 font-semibold px-10 py-5 rounded-2xl text-lg transition-all">Explore Rhysis</a>
      <a href="/syntropia/en/" class="border border-slate-300 hover:border-white px-10 py-5 rounded-2xl text-lg transition-all">Discover Syntropia</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Problem -->
<section class="py-24 bg-white">
  <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6">
    <h2 class="text-4xl font-bold text-center mb-12 text-slate-800">People Are More Than a Label</h2>
    <div class="max-w-none text-slate-600 text-lg leading-relaxed space-y-7">
      <p>For a long time, we have described individuals as if a single static word could define who they are.</p>
      <p>However, these ways of naming do more than just describe a situation: they often transform a temporary condition, a difficulty, or a behavioral pattern into a <strong>fixed identity</strong>.</p>
      <p>This mindset—characteristic of substance ontology—has deeply shaped clinical practice, education, and how we understand ourselves.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Rhysis -->
<section id="rhysis" class="py-24 flow-bg text-white">
  <div class="max-w-5xl mx-auto px-6">
    <div class="text-center mb-16">
      <h2 class="text-5xl font-bold mb-4">The Ontological Inversion of Rhysis</h2>
      <p class="text-2xl text-teal-200">ῥύσις — flow + nature</p>
    </div>
    <div class="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center">
      <div class="bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-md p-10 rounded-3xl">
        <h3 class="text-orange-300 text-xl font-semibold mb-6">Substance Ontology</h3>
        <ul class="space-y-4 text-slate-200">
          <li class="flex items-start"><span class="text-orange-400 mr-3">✗</span> Being precedes change</li>
          <li class="flex items-start"><span class="text-orange-400 mr-3">✗</span> Identity is a stable property</li>
          <li class="flex items-start"><span class="text-orange-400 mr-3">✗</span> Difference is interpreted as deviation</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
      <div class="bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-md p-10 rounded-3xl">
        <h3 class="text-teal-300 text-xl font-semibold mb-6">Process Ontology (Rhysis)</h3>
        <ul class="space-y-4 text-slate-200">
          <li class="flex items-start"><span class="text-teal-400 mr-3">✓</span> Becoming constitutes being</li>
          <li class="flex items-start"><span class="text-teal-400 mr-3">✓</span> Identity reveals the trajectory</li>
          <li class="flex items-start"><span class="text-teal-400 mr-3">✓</span> Difference expresses new possibilities</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Support -->
<section class="py-20 bg-slate-100">
  <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 text-center">
    <h2 class="text-4xl font-bold mb-6 text-slate-800">Support Rhysis</h2>
    <p class="text-lg text-slate-600 mb-10 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
      If this project is meaningful to you, your support helps advance the development of Syntropia and its underlying infrastructure.
    </p>
    <a href="[https://ko-fi.com/rhysis](https://ko-fi.com/rhysis)" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="inline-flex items-center bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white font-semibold px-10 py-5 rounded-2xl text-xl transition-all shadow-lg">Support Project</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Footer -->
<footer class="py-16 bg-slate-900 text-slate-400 text-center">
  <p class="mb-2">© 2026 Rhysis — Epistemological Infrastructure</p>
  <p class="text-sm">— From being to becoming —</p>
</footer>
